rationale: Hard pass: a Dragon Ball Goku/Kamehameha hook is high-energy shounen anime IP that has zero connection to Block Blast's calm, abstract polyomino puzzle loop and no shared visual language (no character, no grid, clashing rainbow palette vs. royal blue board). It also targets a male anime/action-RPG audience that barely overlaps with the 25-55 casual puzzle demographic, and using unlicensed IP is a legal/takedown risk. Do not whitelist this archetype for Block Blast UA.
